text:

text:
Show us the Codex pets you hatched.

Use /hatch to create your own Codex pet.

We'll pick 10 favorites to get 30 days of ChatGPT Pro.
media: quoted_video: Customize your Codex pet with /hatch
notes: Official growth loop: command, user-generated artifact, social submission, subscription prize.

text: NO PURCH. NECESSARY. A PURCH. WILL NOT INCREASE CHANCES OF WINNING. 18+. Runs 5/2/26 at 8:00:00 AM ET through 3:59:59 PM ET on 5/9/26. Total ARV of all prizes: $350. Limit 1 prize per person. Void where prohibited. Sponsor: OpenAI OpCo, LLC 1455 3rd St., San Francisco, CA 94158.
notes: Legal terms show this is a formal developer/social campaign, not casual posting.
